summary: Frontend testing of approval date display fix completed successfully. All 3 implementation points verified: (1) Quote card shows approval date, (2) Modal shows 'Approved:' label with date, (3) PDF export contains approval date. The fix correctly displays approved_at instead of created_at for approved quotes.
